**Formats**

> This documentation is for an out-of-date version of Apache Flink. We recommend you use the latest [stable version](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-stable/zh/docs/connectors/table/formats/overview/>).

#  Formats #

Flink 提供了一套与表连接器（table connector）一起使用的表格式（table format）。表格式是一种存储格式，定义了如何把二进制数据映射到表的列上。

Flink 支持以下格式：

Formats | Supported Connectors
---|---
[CSV](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/formats/csv/>) | [Apache Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/kafka/>), [Upsert Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/upsert-kafka/>), [Amazon Kinesis Data Streams](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/kinesis/>), [Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/firehose/>), [Filesystem](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/filesystem/>)
[JSON](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/formats/json/>) | [Apache Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/kafka/>), [Upsert Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/upsert-kafka/>), [Amazon Kinesis Data Streams](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/kinesis/>), [Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/firehose/>), [Filesystem](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/filesystem/>), [Elasticsearch](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/elasticsearch/>)
[Apache Avro](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/formats/avro/>) | [Apache Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/kafka/>), [Upsert Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/upsert-kafka/>), [Amazon Kinesis Data Streams](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/kinesis/>), [Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/firehose/>), [Filesystem](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/filesystem/>)
[Confluent Avro](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/formats/avro-confluent/>) | [Apache Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/kafka/>), [Upsert Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/upsert-kafka/>)
[Debezium CDC](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/formats/debezium/>) | [Apache Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/kafka/>), [Filesystem](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/filesystem/>)
[Canal CDC](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/formats/canal/>) | [Apache Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/kafka/>), [Filesystem](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/filesystem/>)
[Maxwell CDC](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/formats/maxwell/>) | [Apache Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/kafka/>), [Filesystem](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/filesystem/>)
[OGG CDC](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/formats/ogg/>) | [Apache Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/kafka/>), [Filesystem](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/filesystem/>)
[Apache Parquet](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/formats/parquet/>) | [Filesystem](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/filesystem/>)
[Apache ORC](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/formats/orc/>) | [Filesystem](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/filesystem/>)
[Raw](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/formats/raw/>) | [Apache Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/kafka/>), [Upsert Kafka](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/upsert-kafka/>), [Amazon Kinesis Data Streams](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/kinesis/>), [Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/firehose/>), [Filesystem](<//nightlies.apache.org/flink/flink-docs-release-1.20/zh/docs/connectors/table/filesystem/>)
